prompt: clawd 在初春刚停的细雨后，提着一盏小灯和小包从画面外慢慢走进来，停下来像是在整理想说的话，然后带着一点笨拙和寂寞继续出发去见某个人。
lyricIntent: 熬过冬天之后，带着一点犹豫去见某个人。

playbackBinding.selected: soft warm glow around lamp and bag
playbackBinding.playing: main walking animation with short pause
playbackBinding.paused: gentle breathing idle with light sway

scenePrototype.visualMood: wet floor, pale spring light, quiet departure

prompt: clawd 在夜晚的细雨里沿着湿漉漉的路面缓慢前行，偶尔停在路灯下等待、回望，却始终没有等到要见的人，最后又在雨里继续往前走。
lyricIntent: 一直在路上，也一直在错过；每到关键处，总是下雨。
phaseHints: pause under lamp and look back

playbackBinding.selected: cool light reflection appears on wet ground
playbackBinding.playing: main rain-walk animation with pause and look-back
playbackBinding.paused: light rain idle with minimal sway
playbackBinding.inactive: faint bot outline under dark lamp

scenePrototype.visualMood: streetlamp reflection, damp glass, missed encounter
components: small radio or signal box player object

prompt: clawd 化身为月桂女神般的夜之使者，在深蓝夜色中缓缓显现，抬起钳子召来银白月光与星屑，让周围的空气和地面一点点染上月亮般的冷蓝光。
lyricIntent: 不是赶路，而是作为高位存在改变整个场域。
phaseHints: raise claw and summon silver light
hold lunar field and drifting particles
